title: Eternal Tools
description:
Craft once, use forever. 
A mod that provides you eternal/infinite tools.
body:
![Eternal Tools Banner](https://i.imgur.com/qnsgJQA.jpeg) # An important update about supported versions **We're discontinuing updates for older versions and will only maintain 1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.10, and future 26.1.x (hotfixes only for unsupported versions).** --- Tired of endlessly obtaining iron/diamonds to repair tools or craft a new one? This is a mod that lets you have eternal tools. You’ll have to work for it (obviously). You’ll need to obtain the Eternal Kit and use it to fuse into whatever tool you want. You’ll have every kind of variety at your disposal, check the gallery. Ready to dive into the world of eternity?

Made by JotaPanden
